title: RNAglib: a python package for RNA 2.5 D graphs
author: Vincent Mallet
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: RNA 3D annotations for version 1.0.0 are generated by x3dna-dssr and RNAglib for all RNA in the RCSB-PDB Databank. These are converted to network files by RNAglib.
steps_raw: RNA 3D annotations for version 1.0.0 are generated by x3dna-dssr and RNAglib for all RNA in the RCSB-PDB Databank. These are converted to network files by RNAglib.
